comments.body: Landed on main via Gerrit change 336 (Change-Id I9a30fbc7), merged in 8e35bc70b; replicated to GitHub origin/main. Both gate votes (LLM-Review + Verified) passed. Ready to close via the completion-verifier.

compiled_state.description:
Clean up the top-level README and split the manifest-signing docs.

## What
- Remove the "extracted from digital-service-orchestra" paragraph and the internal ticket id (epic a88f).
- Requirements: rename the two conflicting "Runtime" headings to System prerequisites / Python dependencies, trim the prose, move [eval]/[tracing] into Development & authoring extras, and link every dependency to its official site.
- Quickstart uses brew install.
- CLI reference: drop clarity-check/check-ac/quality-check, sign, verify-signature; add reopen, edit, tag/untag, summary, scratch, session-log(s).
- Move "Signing a manifest of verified steps" to docs/manifest-signing.md with a one-line auto-handled mention.
- Document sync.push/sync.pull/mcp.readonly overrides in the auto-commit section; remove deprecated refs (REBAR_NO_SYNC, --no-sync, REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE, require_verdict_for_close, verdict-hash, config.conf, SCRATCH_BASE_DIR alias).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] README edits applied and internally consistent (no dangling links/refs)
- [ ] docs/manifest-signing.md created with the moved content
- [ ] No deprecated variables/commands remain in README

file_impact.reason: new doc holding the moved manifest-signing section

compiled_state.title: Clean up README + split manifest-signing into its own doc
